bundle.title: AI Config Interest — Woodgrove Health Prompt Management

evidence.snippet: We need a way to compare different prompts side by side before rolling them out. Experimentation might help but our primary concern is prompt versioning.

notes: Customer interest is primarily in AI Config / prompt management
Experimentation is a secondary consideration, not the driving need

human_summary: Woodgrove Health is evaluating AI Config for prompt management with experimentation as secondary interest
No direct experimentation team engagement confirmed yet

because.claim: Customer mentions experimentation as secondary to prompt versioning needs

assumptions: Interest may grow as AI Config adoption deepens
open_questions: Does Woodgrove have a dedicated experimentation team?
Is prompt comparison the full scope or is A/B testing desired?

eic.summary_why_it_matters: AI Config interest may lead to experimentation adoption, but experimentation is not the primary driver.

evidence.snippet: Experimentation mentioned as secondary to prompt versioning
